config.cluster_unit: edit-ORDERING (held-out probes within an ordering are correlated sub-samples)
config.bounding_claim: breaks K-vs-C at MODEST scale (N<=100) with native-knowledge validity; does NOT test true-scale N->2000 (stimulus-gated, C1 tier b). CORE-retention proxy = edited-expr on <=100 records -> rule-of-three bounds CORE-failure <3%, NOT spec <1%.
